identity.description: Turns a text brief or reference image into Direct Minimalist, Maximalist, and Copy-Led Style website directions with generated preview images and CSS/site guidance.

inputs.description: Website design brief and optional remote image reference.

example.direction: A website for a small ceramic lighting studio launching a new collection inspired by moonlight.
example.designDirection: Editorial, tactile, premium, with enough whitespace to feel calm.
example.thirdStyleHint: Let the handmade materials copy decide the third style; expose/reveal is welcome if the process details carry the story.

direction.title: Text Direction
direction.default: A website for a small ceramic lighting studio launching a new collection inspired by moonlight.

designDirection.title: Design Direction
designDirection.default: Editorial, tactile, premium, with enough whitespace to feel calm.

thirdStyleHint.title: Third Style Hint
thirdStyleHint.default: Let the copy decide the third style; use this only as a light creative bias.

unexpectedStyleHint.title: Legacy Third Style Hint
unexpectedStyleHint.description: Backwards-compatible alias for Third Style Hint.

inputs.description: Optional uploaded reference image to interpret as design direction.

outputs.description: Structured brief summary, design languages, CSS guidance, prompts, and generated image metadata.
Markdown CSS and site design handoff guidance for each concept.
Generated preview image for the Direct Minimalist design direction.
Generated preview image for the Maximalist design direction.
Generated preview image for the Copy-Led Style design direction.

skills.name: Website Design Variants
skills.description: Creates Direct Minimalist, Maximalist, and Copy-Led Style website design languages from a text brief or image reference, then generates a preview image and CSS/site guidance for each.
examples: Design a website for an AI-native garden planning app using the three-direction model: direct minimalist, maximalist, and one copy-led style choice.
Use the uploaded packaging image as visual direction for a landing page aimed at boutique retailers.
